bird.name: Morotai friarbird
bird.summary: The Morotai friarbird or dusky friarbird (Philemon fuscicapillus) is a species of friarbird in the honeyeater family Meliphagidae. It is a…

relations.subject: Morotai friarbird
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests and tropical moist shrubland
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Morotai friarbird
relations.evidence: It is probably threatened by habitat loss, as much of the remaining forest in its range is threatened with logging, but more research is needed
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Morotai friarbird
relations.evidence: It is probably threatened by habitat loss, as much of the remaining forest in its range is threatened with logging, but more research is needed
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
